summary: AI v1 Integration Hardening verification complete. All 10 specified features tested and verified. Backend endpoints handle errors gracefully, rate limiting configured correctly, logging captures required fields, and UI has proper disclaimers.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ai/health performs ping and returns {ok: true}
Backend: AI endpoints require authentication (401/403 for unauthorized)
Backend: AI endpoints return safe error messages (422 validation, 404 trust not found)
Backend: AI_CALL log entries contain user_id, trust_id, endpoint, model, input_chars
Frontend: Minutes page shows 'Draft with AI' button with gold styling on Step 4
Frontend: Minutes page shows disclaimer: 'AI helps draft language; you remain responsible for accuracy and legal sufficiency.'
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'AI Recommendations' card with loading state 'Generating suggestions...'
Frontend: Dashboard AI Recommendations card has REFRESH button
Frontend: Dashboard shows disclaimer: 'AI-generated suggestions. You decide which actions to take.'
Frontend: Draft with AI button shows 'Drafting...' loading state when clicked
Frontend: Dashboard AI Recommendations displays suggestions with title, description, estimated points
critical_code_review_comments: AI integration uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with Claude API - LIVE integration (NOT MOCKED)
Rate limiting implemented via in-memory store with proper cleanup of old entries
AI_CALL logging correctly excludes raw content to protect sensitive data
Error messages are safe - no internal details, stack traces, or API keys exposed
Frontend disclaimers use mono font as specified in requirements
Dashboard fallback to static insights when AI fails is implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI v1 hardening features fully verified. Backend rate limits: 10 drafts/hour, 20 suggestions/hour per user. AI_CALL log format: 'AI_CALL | user={user_id} | trust={trust_id} | endpoint={endpoint} | model={model} | input_chars={N}'. Frontend disclaimers in mono font on both Dashboard and Minutes pages. Dashboard AI Recommendations card with REFRESH button and fallback to static insights.

frontend_minutes_disclaimer.text: AI helps draft language; you remain responsible for accuracy and legal sufficiency.

frontend_dashboard_disclaimer.text: AI-generated suggestions. You decide which actions to take.

frontend_draft_with_ai_button.disabled_when: No trust selected or AI drafting in progress

frontend_ai_recommendations_card.title: AI Recommendations
frontend_ai_recommendations_card.subtitle: Personalized suggestions to improve governance
frontend_ai_recommendations_card.fallback: Uses static governance_insights when AI fails

ai_integration_status: LIVE - Using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with Claude API (NOT MOCKED)
